headline: Marriott, IBD Stock Of The Day, In Buy Zone Amid AI Volatility
summary: Stock Of The Day: Marriott jumped 4.5% last week, moving into a buy zone, as hotels fare well amid the AI market sell-off.

raw.headline: Marriott, IBD Stock Of The Day, In Buy Zone Amid AI Volatility
raw.summary: Stock Of The Day: Marriott jumped 4.5% last week, moving into a buy zone, as hotels fare well amid the AI market sell-off.

headline: Top 10 Global Hotel Group Engages PHAL, the First Agentic AI Embedded Operator Advisory for Hospitality
summary: PHAL today commenced its inaugural mandate at the corporate office of one of the world's Top 10 hotel groups, embedded with the group's Asia Pacific leadership and anchored on Finance transformation. This makes PHAL the first Agentic AI Embedded Operator Advisory firm engaged at a Top 10 global hotel group.
